subject: Re: Fw: email for Jeffrey
body:

>

> >From: Alex Reznik <alex@completebody.com>

> >To: kellens@earthlink.net
> >Subject: email for Jeffrey
> >
> > 
> >
> >Dear Jeffrey,
> >
> > 
> >
> >I hope you are well.  Since our last conversation
> you had originally
> >promised to pay me the yearly salary for Igor. 
> Rather than his yearly
> >salary, I agreed on a basic finder's fee, of 30% of
> Igor's yearly salary
> >which was then negotiated down to 20%.   Prior to
> paying this fee, you had
> >expressed that you did not know how long Igor would
> work for you, that you
> >would wait until you felt comfortable with the
> arrangement.   It has been ~
> >nine months and I know you understand the fact that
> I lost a lot of business
> >since he began working for you.  Kindly have your
> bookkeeper made aware that
> >funds ($ 24k) need to be transferred to my account
> - she should have all of
> >my necessary information.  
> >
> > 
> >
> >Thank you very much for letting me stay in your
> beautiful apartment in
> >Paris.
> >
> > 
> >
> >Kind regards,
> >
> >Alex
> >
> > 
> >
> > 
> >

body_html:
--- kellens@earthlink.net wrote:

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Alex Reznik alex@completebody.com
Sent: Jul 31, 2006 10:37 AM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: email for Jeffrey

Dear Jeffrey,

I hope you are well. Since our last conversation
you had originally
promised to pay me the yearly salary for Igor.
Rather than his yearly
salary, I agreed on a basic finder's fee, of 30% of
Igor's yearly salary
which was then negotiated down to 20%. Prior to
paying this fee, you had
expressed that you did not know how long Igor would
work for you, that you
would wait until you felt comfortable with the
arrangement. It has been ~
nine months and I know you understand the fact that
I lost a lot of business
since he began working for you. Kindly have your
bookkeeper made aware that
funds ($ 24k) need to be transferred to my account

  • she should have all of

my necessary information.

Thank you very much for letting me stay in your
beautiful apartment in
Paris.

Kind regards,

Alex

Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam? Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around
http://mail.yahoo.com
